title: Cobblemon Easy Training Items
description: Training cobblemon has become alot easier
body:
This project serves to make training cobblemon alot easier or less time consuming, especially for players that are nuzlocking or playing hardcore with the cobblemon mod. Players can just dig a dirt block at their very feet and in the crafting menu, they will find themselves one rare candy which can be used to level up their pokemon by one. 

There is also another separate datapack with a dirt block and a specific mint leaf to create a specific EV training vitamin, this boosts a pokemon's EVs by 10, making less time consuming for players to find actual items used for the original recipe of the EV training items.
